examples: Purpose: Reduce the danger and upgrade the success in pericardiocentesis.
Therapeutic pericardiocentesis under local anaesthesia and pericardiectomy also require further evaluation.
Interventional Pericardiology: Pericardiocentesis, Pericardioscopy, pericardial Biopsy, Balloon Pericardiotomy, and Intrapericardial Therapy.
